original text:
Peter Jackson is the current go-to-guy for sweeping epics including Dwarves, Elves and dragons. The original 'Lord of the Rings' trilogy was entirely successful and brought to life a story a lot of us grew up reading. I thought the Rankin and Bass animations were pretty awesome for what they were, but Jackson's film treatment of the series blew away any of my expectations. Before Jackson began the conversion, I had the poorly carried out vision of a little nightmare of a film called 'Dungeons & Dragons' by director Courtney Solomon, stuck in my head as for what Jackson's films would probably end up looking like. This is one moment where I was beyond thrilled to be wrong. Now someone go back and fix the 'Dungeons & Dragons' movie, please?
I'm ready for, beyond ready, for the finale! Not just is this one of my beloved books I grew up with, but the story, even with its differences, is by far, the best treatment it could get in the industry today and that is thanks to Peter Jackson.
Maybe we can petition him to fix 'Dungeons & Dragons' after this!
This entry was posted on Saturday, April 26th, 2014 at 9:16 am	and is filed under Books, Events, Film, News. You can follow any responses to this entry through the RSS 2.0 feed. You can skip to the end and leave a response. Pinging is currently not allowed.
" Josh Gad Teaming Up With Disney Again!!!

" Josh Gad Teaming Up With Disney Again!!!

original text:
The Communication of a company is expressed not only through its marketing, but also and above all, through its visual communication. For this reason the contribution of the graphic designer is crucial in research and the creation of a custom identity, consistent, easily identifiable, unifying and revealing of the values ​​of the company. A strong visual sense that is appropriately targeted leads your brand to be clearly identified and stored in memory.
Myriam Cohen Studio is a graphic design agency based in Jerusalem. Listening to your desires, your needs and your beliefs, we anticipate your desires, sometimes overturning your codes, and innovate while respecting the values ​​that represent your brand.
We assist your company in all your creative projects, the outline of a first visual identity, such as the establishment of a marketing launch or the revitalization your brand. Our areas of expertise range from packaging for all types of products and logos, through posters, presentation brochures, new commercial space, and other media related to visual communication of a company that is dynamic and looking to the future.
We propose a custom tailored creation to your brand or your business, constant monitoring of projects, and constant availability. We take care of your communication and from its conception to its realization.
Powered by the highest professionalism, Myriam Cohen Studio brings concrete results for its achievements and supports its clients in a relationship based on trust and efficiency.
תבליט את המותג שלך "
Myriam Cohen studied Graphic Arts in Paris in 1996 at the prestigious ESAG - Penninghen (Higher School of Graphic Arts) and then continued her studies by specializing in visual communication at the Ecole d'Art Maryse Eloy (newly renamed "Paris School of Visual Arts") where graduated in 2000. She has worked in the largest agencies in Paris as a freelance before joining the department cosmetic Hotshop agency that specializes in packaging.
Since 2005, Myriam moved to Israel where she worked for larger agencies (Neogroup, Adlai & Partners, and Adler Brands of the advertising group Grey Israel), absorbing the language, culture, and local graphics.
In 2008, Myriam Cohen decided to create his own graphic design studio that enables her to express her own creativity, enriched by her many experiences to provide a work conceived in the utmost care, with the finest attention to detail and concern for the highest quality.
